---
title: "Street Networks in R"
description: "Andrea Gilardi and Robin Lovelace (2020). Street Networks in R. *OSF*. https://doi.org/10.17605/OSF.IO/WTQAS"
date: "2020-05-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "gilardi_street_2020"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "OSF"
doi: "10.17605/OSF.IO/WTQAS"
publication-url: "https://osf.io/wtqas/"
authors:
  - "Andrea Gilardi"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "The idea of this project is to compare stplanr and dodgr approaches to street networks in R. This is a draft for the paper. Hosted on the Open Science Framework"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** OSF
**Year:** 2020

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.17605/OSF.IO/WTQAS) [Publisher Link](https://osf.io/wtqas/) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

The idea of this project is to compare stplanr and dodgr approaches to street networks in R. This is a draft for the paper. Hosted on the Open Science Framework

## Citation

Andrea Gilardi and Robin Lovelace (2020). Street Networks in R. *OSF*. https://doi.org/10.17605/OSF.IO/WTQAS

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{gilardi_street_2020,
	title = {Street {Networks} in {R}},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {https://osf.io/wtqas/},
	doi = {10.17605/OSF.IO/WTQAS},
	abstract = {The idea of this project is to compare stplanr and dodgr approaches to street networks in R. This is a draft for the paper.  
    Hosted on the Open Science Framework},
	language = {en},
	urldate = {2020-06-26},
	publisher = {OSF},
	author = {Gilardi, Andrea and Lovelace, Robin},
	month = may,
	year = {2020},
	note = {ZSCC: NoCitationData[s0]},
	keywords = {R},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
